test-case.description: Must be run from PowerShell 7 (pwsh) (this is the orchestration shell)
test-case.name: COM5411 IaC Environment Preflight (Dual-Shell).Entry requirements.Must be run from PowerShell 7 (pwsh) (this is the orchestration shell)

test-case.description: Should be run as Administrator (recommended for meaningful preflight)
test-case.name: COM5411 IaC Environment Preflight (Dual-Shell).Entry requirements.Should be run as Administrator (recommended for meaningful preflight)
COM5411 IaC Environment Preflight (Dual-Shell).Entry requirements.Repo root contains Run_BuildMain.ps1 (orchestrator)

test-case.description: PSModulePath is set in PowerShell 7 (current process)
test-case.name: COM5411 IaC Environment Preflight (Dual-Shell).Diagnostics (support visibility).PSModulePath is set in PowerShell 7 (current process)

test-case.description: PSModulePath is set in Windows PowerShell 5.1
test-case.name: COM5411 IaC Environment Preflight (Dual-Shell).Diagnostics (support visibility).PSModulePath is set in Windows PowerShell 5.1

test-case.description: DSC v3 CLI exists on PATH (dsc.exe)
test-case.name: COM5411 IaC Environment Preflight (Dual-Shell).Toolchain (PowerShell 7).DSC v3 CLI exists on PATH (dsc.exe)

failure.message: RuntimeException: DSC v3 CLI (dsc.exe) not found on PATH. NEXT STEP (do this first, then re-run Preflight): 1) Open PowerShell 7 as Administrator 2) From the REPO ROOT run: .\Run_BuildMain.ps1 3) Then re-run: Invoke-Pester -Path .\Tests\Pester\Preflight-Environment.Tests.ps1 -Output Detailed DETAILS: The term 'dsc' is not recognized as a name of a cmdlet, function, script file, or executable program. Check the spelling of the name, or if a path was included, verify that the path is correct and try again.
